---
title: "Warne\'s Home Annual"
---

## Warne\'s Home Annual

**Author:** Laura Valentine
**Date:** 1868
**Imprint:** London: Warne

### Notes

This volume contained a story called \'Cross Purposes\' by Christabel Coleridge and a translation by CMY of a story by Henriette de Witt.

---

[← Back to all letters](../../letters.html)
